titleZh: 全景式探析对赌争议中的疑难问题系列（四）——公司法的视角
titleEn: Panoramic Analysis of Difficult Issues in VAM Disputes (IV): A Company-Law Perspective
abstractZh: 从资本维持、回购履行、减资、资本公积返还和司法解释动向等方面，系统讨论对赌争议中公司法约束与救济路径。
abstractEn: Examines VAM disputes through the lens of capital maintenance, buyback performance, capital reduction, repayment from reserves, and emerging judicial-interpretation trends.
